prompt: I need to create a project note in my Obsidian vault for a new client engagement. The client is Meridian Consulting, we're rebuilding their internal HR portal. Deadline is June 30th 2026, project lead is me (Adhitya), status is 'active'. I'm using PARA — so my vault structure is 1-Projects/, 2-Areas/, 3-Resources/, 4-Archive/. The note should link to a contact note [[Meridian Consulting]] and a resource note [[HR Portal Requirements]]. Include a task list with at least 3 initial tasks.
assertions: Output contains YAML frontmatter (fenced by ---) with at least tags, date, and status fields
Output uses wikilinks [[Meridian Consulting]] and [[HR Portal Requirements]], not markdown links
Output includes at least 3 task items using - [ ] checkbox syntax
Output uses a heading structure appropriate for a project note
Output does not use any forbidden characters in file path (# ^ [ ] | \)
Due date is represented as 2026-06-30 in frontmatter
